summary: P4 Batch Testing Complete: Homepage Design Polish, Enhanced Free Tools (TikTok Analyzer + Product Trend Checker), Competitor Store Intelligence Engine. All 7 backend tests passed, all frontend features verified.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/products/{id}/competitor-intelligence is PUBLIC (no auth required) - returns 200

Backend: Competitor-intelligence response contains all required fields: product_id, stores_detected, new_stores_7d, price_range, avg_store_age_months, advertising_activity, ads_detected, competition_level, competition_impact
Backend: All data types correct - stores_detected (int), new_stores_7d (int), price_range (dict with low/high), avg_store_age_months (number)
Backend: Price range structure valid with low <= high values
Backend: Returns 404 for non-existent product
Backend: API health check passes
Backend: Public featured product endpoint accessible
Frontend: Homepage hero-section (data-testid='hero-section') present with polished design
Frontend: Headline 'Find Winning Ecommerce Products Before They Go Viral' displays correctly
Frontend: Hero CTA buttons present (hero-cta-btn, hero-secondary-btn)
Frontend: Live demo card (data-testid='live-demo-card') shows real product data with Launch Score, Success Prob, Est. Profit
Frontend: Social proof bar shows 137+ Products, 8 Live Data Sources, 7-Signal AI Scoring, Real Data Only
Frontend: How It Works section (data-testid='how-it-works-section') with 3 steps (Discover, Launch, Advertise)
Frontend: Pricing section (data-testid='pricing-section') shows Free £0, Pro £39, Elite £99 plans
Frontend: Nav has 'Tools' link navigating to /tools
Frontend: /tools page (data-testid='free-tools-page') shows 4 tools
Frontend: Profit Calculator (data-testid='profit-calculator') present
Frontend: Saturation Checker (data-testid='saturation-checker') present
Frontend: TikTok Analyzer (data-testid='tiktok-analyzer') - URL input (tiktok-url-input) and Analyze button (tiktok-analyze-btn) functional

Frontend: TikTok results (data-testid='tiktok-results') show views (1,468,165), engagement (12.0%), virality (High), product potential (Strong), hashtag growth (+65%), ad detection (Likely being advertised)
Frontend: Product Trend Checker (data-testid='trend-checker') - input (trend-product-input) and Check button (trend-check-btn) functional

Frontend: Trend results (data-testid='trend-results') show trend score (64), search growth (+56%), stage (Emerging), demand (Growing), best time (Now - early mover advantage), risk (Medium - watch closely)
Frontend: Product detail page shows SaturationRadar (data-testid='saturation-radar') with Low Risk badge, 27/100 score
Frontend: Product detail page shows CompetitorIntelligence (data-testid='competitor-intelligence') with Medium Competition badge
Frontend: Competitor Intelligence shows 21 stores detected (comp-stores), 1 new stores 7d (comp-new-stores)
Frontend: Competitor Intelligence shows estimated price range £18-£35, avg store age 5 months, advertising activity Low, 0 active ads
Frontend: Competitor Intelligence shows impact: 'Moderate competition — branding matters'
context_for_next_testing_agent: P4 Batch testing complete. Three feature groups verified: (1) Homepage Design Polish - Hero section with gradient CTA buttons, live demo card with real product data, social proof bar (137+ products, 8 data sources, 7-signal scoring, real data only), How It Works with 3 steps, Pricing with Free/Pro/Elite plans. (2) Enhanced Free Tools - /tools page with 4 tools including new TikTok Analyzer (simulated results based on URL input) and Product Trend Checker (simulated results based on keyword). (3) Competitor Store Intelligence Engine - GET /api/products/{id}/competitor-intelligence is PUBLIC endpoint (no auth), returns stores_detected, new_stores_7d, price_range, avg_store_age_months, advertising_activity, ads_detected, competition_level, competition_impact. Frontend CompetitorIntelligence component shows data on product detail page alongside SaturationRadar.

P4_Homepage_Design_Polish.hero_section: data-testid='hero-section' with gradient background, premium typography
P4_Homepage_Design_Polish.headline: Find Winning Ecommerce Products Before They Go Viral
P4_Homepage_Design_Polish.live_demo_card: data-testid='live-demo-card' shows real product with Launch Score, Success Prob, Est. Profit
P4_Homepage_Design_Polish.social_proof: 137+ Products, 8 Live Data Sources, 7-Signal AI Scoring, Real Data Only
P4_Homepage_Design_Polish.pricing: data-testid='pricing-section' with Free £0, Pro £39 (Most Popular), Elite £99

mocked_apis.Product Trend Checker: Frontend simulation - deterministic results based on product keyword
